title: Atsumori: A Noh Play on War and Compassion
description: A warrior who killed a boy in battle returns years later as a monk and meets the boy's ghost — forgiveness across death.
introduction: A warrior who killed a boy in battle returns years later as a monk and meets the boy's ghost — forgiveness across death.

translation.original_text: 人間五十年、下天のうちを比ぶれば、夢幻の如くなり。
translation.text: Fifty years of human life — compared to the realm below heaven, it is like a dream, an illusion.
